title: 9 Claude Code Plugins to Build 10x Faster
summary: Austin Marchese reviews 9 Claude Code plugins designed to improve development speed and cost efficiency. The plugins include Caveman, Exa, Firecrawl, Compound Engineering, Higgsfield, Anthropic tools, and others for web scraping, media generation, model swapping, and token spend monitoring.
